docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-02-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-31-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 1/31/06 AT 1:30 P.M. FOR PROGRESS REPORT.

DEFT'S NEW ADDRESS PER RETURNED MAIL. 22284 MISSION BLVD # A HAYWARD CA 94541.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AYATCH, GLORY

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-18-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-16-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 STIPULATED JUDGMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR $3941; $62.87 COSTS. IF NO APPEARANCES CASE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS INTERVALS UNTIL PAID IN FULL, AT WHICH TIME CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT AYATCH, GLORY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-01-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-02-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT SENT TO GLORY AYATCH RETURNED UNDELIVERED. RESENT TO NEW ADDRESS.
